title: Services that often ask for these documents
intro: Many expats arrange these services early, and they may commonly request identity or address-related documents.

items.reason: Banking onboarding often asks for identity and address-related context.
Useful for international transfers during relocation setup.
Insurance comparisons are often part of first-month settlement.
Housing-related services often connect closely with address documentation.
